audit_items.proof_trace: The only raw pointer dereference in the file is `*ppx` at L68 inside `_internal_accept_owner`; `ppx` originates exclusively from `this` of a live `shared_ptr` object in `sp_enable_shared_from_this`, so it is invariantly non-null. `shared_from_this()` constructs `shared_ptr<T>(weak_this_)` whose underlying `shared_count(weak_count const &)` constructor throws `bad_weak_ptr` when the weak_ptr is empty or expired (shared_count.hpp:304-307), preventing a null shared_ptr from being silently returned; the function returns the resulting shared_ptr without dereferencing it internally.
